scrape_method: Claude in Chrome MCP (mcp__Claude_in_Chrome) — manual mouse-wheel scrolling, JS DOM harvesting via window.__fl0w_posts accumulator keyed by /status/{id} href
limitations: Did not cover full 7-day window — only ~52 hours (5/11 14:55 to 5/13 19:05 UTC)
Bullflow.io chart screenshots not individually downloaded — strike/exp/premium extracted by eye from live scroll screenshots, not OCR'd systematically
Subscribe-locked 'heatmap' commentary posts (~1/3 of his feed) not auditable — content-gated
Time window for DB query was -30min / +3hrs from post timestamp; some 'OUT-OF-CHAIN' verdicts may collapse to MISSED-NO-TICKER with wider window
next_steps: P0: Fix MID-of-spread side detection (5 wrong-side cases)
P1: Investigate why only 165/421 universe tickers had rows today
P2: Auto-expand chain on $1M+ notional strikes
P3: Add 10 universe tickers: TTD, TOST, NXE, KEEL, SSRM, NPWR, LUMN, SONY, VNET, QURE
P4: Build daily X-scrape → vision-OCR → flow_alerts cross-check Telegram digest cron
